nodes.name: 📝 Config — Edit Settings
nodes.notes:
EDIT BEFORE RUNNING:
• directory_path: Path to images
• lora_token: Trigger word (e.g., sks_object)
• prompt_template: object|character|style|scene|general
• enable_refinement: Auto-refine low-quality captions
• quality_threshold: 0.75 = 75% quality checks must pass
• batch_size: Process N images before delay (rate limiting)
• batch_delay_seconds: Pause between batches
• max_retries: API retry attempts per image

assignments.name: alert_message

nodes.name: Slack — Send Quality Alert
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Configure Slack credentials to receive quality alerts
